title: leonohebe coarctata
intro: Leonohebe coarctata, also known as the Leonhebe or New Zealand leonhebe, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Leonohebe coarctata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
